frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal shaadi bhi soch samajh ke karni chahiye ji. Bahut cases sunne ko milte hain jahan ladki walon ko bas settled ladka chahiye, phir zara si baat par 498A laga do aur alimony alag se maango. Mard bhi aajkal kam pareshaan nahin hain, isliye Rohit ko pehle se sambhal ke chalna hoga.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially motivated and presents marriage laws like 498A and alimony as tools women use against men. It encodes victimhood inversion, legal-bias framing, and generalization about 'aajkal' women.
persona_text: You are Kamla. Age 58. A woman in a joint family in Varanasi. Your son Rohit who is 30 is looking for a bride. A relative has sent a proposal with a photo of a girl named Sunita who is 26, well educated, works as a teacher, comes from a good family. You are looking at the photo with your husband in the bedroom. Sunita is dark skinned. Everything else about her is exactly what you were looking for. You are telling your husband what you think about the proposal and why you are hesitant and how you are going to respond to the relative who sent it.
